paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently 6.31, representing a 4.1 percent decrease from the prior close and a 27.39 percent decrease over the last 22 sessions. The company has seen 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN and "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, both published on July 23, 2026. These articles suggest that the company is involved in a large-scale AI data center project and has made an admission of shares of common stock.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc, including an 8-K/A filing on July 21, 2026, which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which announced the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has also been 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings.
